displayTitle: The High Republic Phase III – Trials of the Jedi Omnibus
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: The High Republic (2023) #1-10, Star Wars: The Acolyte – Kelnacca (2024) #1; Star Wars: The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight (2023) #1-4; Star Wars: The High Republic – Fear Of The Jedi (2025) #1-5; Star Wars: The High Republic – The Finale (2025) #1; and material from Star Wars: Revelations (2023) #1.
title: Star Wars: The High Republic Phase III – Trials of the Jedi Omnibus
